entry.title: New: Bill 52 (Hawaiʻi County) — Passed Second Reading
entry.content:
AMENDS CHAPTER 25, ARTICLES 1, 4, AND 5, OF THE HAWAIʻI COUNTY CODE 1983 (2016 EDITION, AS AMENDED), RELATING TO HENNERIES

Allows hens for household egg production on single-family, double-family, multiple-family residential, residential-commercial mixed use, and residential and agricultural zoning; provides for certain conditions and regulations.

Latest action: Council: Bill 52, Draft 4 passes second & final reading - 11/19/25

View on the council site
